TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Lay-te_malkaka, title = Lay-te_malkaka, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Lay-te_malkaka} }

S.FORM: Lay-te malkaka ŤźäÁČĻŚÖĄŚľü kakiliman Lay-te malkaka "kamu nu inggu Wright brothers" nayi amilika a lecuh i in-dian-na-atu ey-hay-ey-cu, nu ayawan nu amilika pahikukuay,cacayay ku puna nuheni malkaka awwil.laytw nu ing a kamusa; Orville Wright,1871 a mihcaan 8 abulad 19 ademiad katukuh 1948 amihcaan 1 abulad 30 ademiad" atu wi-pul-lay-te "nu ing a kamu Wilbur Wright,1867 amihcaan 4 abulad 16 ademiad katukuh 1912 a mihcaan 5abulad 30 ademiad". (ŤčĪŤ™ě:Orville Wright,1871ŚĻī8śúą19śó•‚ÄĒ1948ŚĻī1śúą30śó•)ŚíĆŚ®ĀÁąĺšľĮ¬∑ŤźäÁČĻ(ŤčĪŤ™ě:Wilbur Wright,1867ŚĻī4śúą16śó•‚ÄĒ1912ŚĻī5śúą30śó•). nilaculan 1903 amihcaan 12 abulad 17 ademiad Lay-te malkaka paculil kuheni tu nikingkiwan nuhine a hikuki sakacacay ku banggu malaheci inemekan sayaway kubaeket nu balia sapaculil tu hikuki matulun kapah a saungayay kyu mabahel, ayda sa matineng tu naming ku katuuday tu nipikingkiw nuheni tu hikuki. Lay-te malkakacaay kaw heni ku sayaway mikingkiw tu sapacumud tu sabahel nu hikuki a tademaw, nika u heni kusayaway a mitanam tu sapabahel tu satedep atu sapisa ungaay nu canan nu hukuki, nanutawya sa mapatucek nu misangaay tu hikuki maneknek tu, wini analimaan a gigice neknek satu i hikuli. yum atabal henay ci Lay-te malkaka y anisibayan nuheni tu miinsacuay a kikay, batikal, kadideng atu duma u kikayay masasuala, wini a gigicu nu nalimaan nuheni u paneknekay tu patetekay, macalilaw ku sapabahel nu neni tu hikuki makakic tu kunidatenga nu heni. u heni ani sangaan tu adidi'ay a cacumudan nu bali nitanaman nuheni, yadah tu kunisuped masatungus tuway ku sulit, nisikian nuheni idaw ku talakaway a sakubad nu hikuki atu pulupila. Lay-te malkaka atu makakadum misiki tu sayaway a hikuki nu inzing. Namakayni i 1900 amihcaan malingatu katukuh i 1903 amihcaan nuheni sayawaw apabahel tu musaungayay nu ayawan sa, malwkaka naw saselic sananah a micumud misatabaki a mitanam atu miecaw, mala u sakapahay a paculilay tu hikuki kuheni, u hen isa kapah kuni pahabay nuheni tu nikasasupaini tu baluau' u kapahay a paculilay tu pabahelay tu hikuki a tademaw. Lay-te malekaka pakayni i tademaw idaw ku nipakihu, sisa imahini mulangatu tu sapikingkiw kanahatu idaw ku alialiyac idaw aca ku matudungay a nisangan tu pacakatu tu kakawaw. Lay-te malekaka wama nuheni sa u ciwlu nu midindusiay, sisa hinatahekal midang. 1878 a mihcaan adidi' henay kuwawa pataluma tu baluhay sakahemekan a canan. 1878 amihcaan, namiliwku taluma pataluma tu kahemekan a cacanan; mahidaay u bahel sananay a hikuki a sasalamaan. ina sasalamaan namakayni nu huwaku nu sayaway ni al-hung-se.ban-naw anikingkiwan nisikian kyu masanga, hatida cacay a adepah ku tanayu',u tatipeluk, u culay atu dawmiay a kilang nisangaan, odaw kiyani pakabit tu cowling sapasaungay malapulipila. Lay-te malekaka tanunamuh sa makaadih tu mahiniay a baluhay kahemeka a sasalamaan,mapeci nuheni sa misangaaca kuhini hida nu sayaway. . Lay-te malekaka nadikuda dateng sa kuheni nanutawya mapacekil kuheni tu sakay bahel tu hikuki .
S.PHON: r~…ĺaj-t…ô mar~…ĺkaka **** kakir~…ĺiman r~…ĺaj-t…ô mar~…ĺkaka "kamu nu iŇčgu wrigńßt brotńß…ôrs" naji amir~…ĺika a r~…ĺ…ô ¶uńß i in-dian-na-atu …ô-ńßaj-…ô- ¶u, nu ajawan nu amir~…ĺika pańßikukuaj, ¶a ¶ajaj ku puna nuńß…ôni mar~…ĺkaka awwir~…ĺ.r~…ĺajtw nu iŇč a kamusa; or*ir~…ĺr~…ĺ…ô wrigńßt,**** a mińß ¶aan * abur~…ĺad ** ad…ômiad katukuńß **** amińß ¶aan * abur~…ĺad ** ad…ômiad" atu wi-pur~…ĺ-r~…ĺaj-t…ô "nu iŇč a kamu wir~…ĺbur wrigńßt,**** amińß ¶aan * abur~…ĺad ** ad…ômiad katukuńß **** a mińß ¶aan *abur~…ĺad ** ad…ômiad". (**:or*ir~…ĺr~…ĺ…ô wrigńßt,*********************)*******(**:wir~…ĺbur wrigńßt,*********************). nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan **** amińß ¶aan ** abur~…ĺad ** ad…ômiad r~…ĺaj-t…ô mar~…ĺkaka pa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ kuńß…ôni tu nikiŇčkiwan nuńßin…ô a ńßikuki saka ¶a ¶aj ku baŇčgu mar~…ĺańß…ô ¶i in…ôm…ôkan sajawaj kuba…ôk…ôt nu bar~…ĺia sapa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ tu ńßikuki matur~…ĺun kapańß a sauŇčajaj kju mabańß…ôr~…ĺ, ajda sa matin…ôŇč tu namiŇč ku katuudaj tu nipikiŇčkiw nuńß…ôni tu ńßikuki. r~…ĺaj-t…ô mar~…ĺkaka ¶aaj kaw ńß…ôni ku sajawaj mikiŇčkiw tu sapa ¶umud tu sabańß…ôr~…ĺ nu ńßikuki a tad…ômaw, nika u ńß…ôni kusajawaj a mitanam tu sapabańß…ôr~…ĺ tu sat…ôd…ôp atu sapisa uŇčaaj nu ¶anan nu ńßukuki, nanutawja sa mapatu ¶…ôk nu misaŇčaaj tu ńßikuki man…ôkn…ôk tu, wini anar~…ĺimaan a gigi ¶…ô n…ôkn…ôk satu i ńßikur~…ĺi. jum atabar~…ĺ ńß…ônaj ¶i r~…ĺaj-t…ô mar~…ĺkaka j anisibajan nuńß…ôni tu miinsa ¶uaj a kikaj, batikar~…ĺ, kadid…ôŇč atu duma u kikajaj masasuar~…ĺa, wini a gigi ¶u nu nar~…ĺimaan nuńß…ôni u pan…ôkn…ôkaj tu pat…ôt…ôkaj, ma ¶ar~…ĺir~…ĺaw ku sapabańß…ôr~…ĺ nu n…ôni tu ńßikuki makaki ¶ tu kunidat…ôŇča nu ńß…ôni. u ńß…ôni ani saŇčaan tu adidi Ē~ °aj a ¶a ¶umudan nu bar~…ĺi nitanaman nuńß…ôni, jadańß tu kunisup…ôd masatuŇčus tuwaj ku sur~…ĺit, nisikian nuńß…ôni idaw ku tar~…ĺakawaj a sakubad nu ńßikuki atu pur~…ĺupir~…ĺa. r~…ĺaj-t…ô mar~…ĺkaka atu makakadum misiki tu sajawaj a ńßikuki nu inziŇč. namakajni i **** amińß ¶aan mar~…ĺiŇčatu katukuńß i **** amińß ¶aan nuńß…ôni sajawaw apabańß…ôr~…ĺ tu musauŇčajaj nu ajawan sa, mar~…ĺwkaka naw sas…ôr~…ĺi ¶ sananańß a mi ¶umud misatabaki a mitanam atu mi…ô ¶aw, mar~…ĺa u sakapańßaj a pa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺaj tu ńßikuki kuńß…ôni, u ńß…ôn isa kapańß kuni pańßabaj nuńß…ôni tu nikasasupaini tu bar~…ĺuau Ē~ ° u kapańßaj a pa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺaj tu pabańß…ôr~…ĺaj tu ńßikuki a tad…ômaw. r~…ĺaj-t…ô mar~…ĺ…ôkaka pakajni i tad…ômaw idaw ku nipakińßu, sisa imańßini mur~…ĺaŇčatu tu sapikiŇčkiw kanańßatu idaw ku ar~…ĺiar~…ĺija ¶ idaw a ¶a ku matuduŇčaj a nisaŇčan tu pa ¶akatu tu kakawaw. r~…ĺaj-t…ô mar~…ĺ…ôkaka wama nuńß…ôni sa u ¶iwr~…ĺu nu midindusiaj, sisa ńßinatańß…ôkar~…ĺ midaŇč. **** a mińß ¶aan adidi Ē~ ° ńß…ônaj kuwawa patar~…ĺuma tu bar~…ĺuńßaj sakańß…ôm…ôkan a ¶anan. **** amińß ¶aan, namir~…ĺiwku tar~…ĺuma patar~…ĺuma tu kańß…ôm…ôkan a ¶a ¶anan; mańßidaaj u bańß…ôr~…ĺ sananaj a ńßikuki a sasar~…ĺamaan. ina sasar~…ĺamaan namakajni nu ńßuwaku nu sajawaj ni ar~…ĺ-ńßuŇč-s…ô.ban-naw anikiŇčkiwan nisikian kju masaŇča, ńßatida ¶a ¶aj a ad…ôpańß ku tanaju Ē~ °,u tatip…ôr~…ĺuk, u ¶ur~…ĺaj atu dawmiaj a kir~…ĺaŇč nisaŇčaan, odaw kijani pakabit tu ¶owr~…ĺiŇč sapasauŇčaj mar~…ĺapur~…ĺipir~…ĺa. r~…ĺaj-t…ô mar~…ĺ…ôkaka tanunamuńß sa makaadińß tu mańßiniaj a bar~…ĺuńßaj kańß…ôm…ôka a sasar~…ĺamaan,map…ô ¶i nuńß…ôni sa misaŇčaa ¶a kuńßini ńßida nu sajawaj. . r~…ĺaj-t…ô mar~…ĺ…ôkaka nadikuda dat…ôŇč sa kuńß…ôni nanutawja mapa ¶…ôkir~…ĺ kuńß…ôni tu sakaj bańß…ôr~…ĺ tu ńßikuki .
S.FORM: Lay-te malkaka ŤźäÁČĻŚÖĄŚľü kakiliman Lay-te malkaka "kamu nu inggu Wright brothers" nayi amilika a lecuh i in-dian-na-atu ey-hay-ey-cu, nu ayawan nu amilika pahikukuay,cacayay ku puna nuheni malkaka awwil.laytw nu ing a kamusa; Orville Wright,1871 a mihcaan 8 abulad 19 ademiad katukuh 1948 amihcaan 1 abulad 30 ademiad" atu wi-pul-lay-te "nu ing a kamu Wilbur Wright,1867 amihcaan 4 abulad 16 ademiad katukuh 1912 a mihcaan 5abulad 30 ademiad". (ŤčĪŤ™ě:Orville Wright,1871ŚĻī8śúą19śó•‚ÄĒ1948ŚĻī1śúą30śó•)ŚíĆŚ®ĀÁąĺšľĮ¬∑ŤźäÁČĻ(ŤčĪŤ™ě:Wilbur Wright,1867ŚĻī4śúą16śó•‚ÄĒ1912ŚĻī5śúą30śó•). nilaculan 1903 amihcaan 12 abulad 17 ademiad Lay-te malkaka paculil kuheni tu nikingkiwan nuhine a hikuki sakacacay ku banggu malaheci inemekan sayaway kubaeket nu balia sapaculil tu hikuki matulun kapah a saungayay kyu mabahel, ayda sa matineng tu naming ku katuuday tu nipikingkiw nuheni tu hikuki. Lay-te malkakacaay kaw heni ku sayaway mikingkiw tu sapacumud tu sabahel nu hikuki a tademaw, nika u heni kusayaway a mitanam tu sapabahel tu satedep atu sapisa ungaay nu canan nu hukuki, nanutawya sa mapatucek nu misangaay tu hikuki maneknek tu, wini analimaan a gigice neknek satu i hikuli. yum atabal henay ci Lay-te malkaka y anisibayan nuheni tu miinsacuay a kikay, batikal, kadideng atu duma u kikayay masasuala, wini a gigicu nu nalimaan nuheni u paneknekay tu patetekay, macalilaw ku sapabahel nu neni tu hikuki makakic tu kunidatenga nu heni. u heni ani sangaan tu adidi'ay a cacumudan nu bali nitanaman nuheni, yadah tu kunisuped masatungus tuway ku sulit, nisikian nuheni idaw ku talakaway a sakubad nu hikuki atu pulupila. Lay-te malkaka atu makakadum misiki tu sayaway a hikuki nu inzing. Namakayni i 1900 amihcaan malingatu katukuh i 1903 amihcaan nuheni sayawaw apabahel tu musaungayay nu ayawan sa, malwkaka naw saselic sananah a micumud misatabaki a mitanam atu miecaw, mala u sakapahay a paculilay tu hikuki kuheni, u hen isa kapah kuni pahabay nuheni tu nikasasupaini tu baluau' u kapahay a paculilay tu pabahelay tu hikuki a tademaw. Lay-te malekaka pakayni i tademaw idaw ku nipakihu, sisa imahini mulangatu tu sapikingkiw kanahatu idaw ku alialiyac idaw aca ku matudungay a nisangan tu pacakatu tu kakawaw. Lay-te malekaka wama nuheni sa u ciwlu nu midindusiay, sisa hinatahekal midang. 1878 a mihcaan adidi' henay kuwawa pataluma tu baluhay sakahemekan a canan. 1878 amihcaan, namiliwku taluma pataluma tu kahemekan a cacanan; mahidaay u bahel sananay a hikuki a sasalamaan. ina sasalamaan namakayni nu huwaku nu sayaway ni al-hung-se.ban-naw anikingkiwan nisikian kyu masanga, hatida cacay a adepah ku tanayu',u tatipeluk, u culay atu dawmiay a kilang nisangaan, odaw kiyani pakabit tu cowling sapasaungay malapulipila. Lay-te malekaka tanunamuh sa makaadih tu mahiniay a baluhay kahemeka a sasalamaan,mapeci nuheni sa misangaaca kuhini hida nu sayaway. . Lay-te malekaka nadikuda dateng sa kuheni nanutawya mapacekil kuheni tu sakay bahel tu hikuki .

satu i ńßikur~…ĺi. jum atabar~…ĺ ńß…ônaj ¶i r~…ĺaj-t…ô mar~…ĺkaka j anisibajan nuńß…ôni tu miinsa ¶uaj a kikaj, batikar~…ĺ, kadid…ôŇč atu duma u kikajaj masasuar~…ĺa, wini a gigi ¶u nu nar~…ĺimaan nuńß…ôni u pan…ôkn…ôkaj tu pat…ôt…ôkaj, ma ¶ar~…ĺir~…ĺaw ku sapabańß…ôr~…ĺ nu n…ôni tu ńßikuki makaki ¶ tu kunidat…ôŇča nu ńß…ôni. u ńß…ôni ani saŇčaan tu adidi Ē~ °aj a ¶a ¶umudan nu bar~…ĺi ¶a ku matuduŇčaj a nisaŇčan tu pa ¶akatu tu kakawaw. r~…ĺaj-t…ô mar~…ĺ…ôkaka wama nuńß…ôni sa u ¶iwr~…ĺu nu midindusiaj, sisa ńßinatańß…ôkar~…ĺ midaŇč. **** a mińß ¶aan adidi Ē~ ° ńß…ônaj kuwawa sa misaŇčaa ¶a kuńßini ńßida nu sajawaj. . r~…ĺaj-t…ô mar~…ĺ…ôkaka nadikuda dat…ôŇč sa kuńß…ôni nanutawja mapa ¶…ôkir~…ĺ kuńß…ôni tu sakaj bańß…ôr~…ĺ tu ńßikuki .
